title: Distrike Language Selection
target: Select the optimal implementation language for Distrike, a cross-platform Agent-friendly disk space kill-line detector with MFT direct-read capability
constraints: must compile to single static binary (no runtime dependency)
must cross-compile to Windows/macOS/Linux from one codebase
must support concurrent directory traversal (goroutine/thread pool)
must have NTFS MFT parsing library available
must integrate with existing cygctl Go ecosystem
must support SQLite for scan caching without CGO
developer has Go experience (cygctl), limited Rust/Zig experience
